title: contingency-dsl Core-TrialBased AST
description: AST node definitions for Core-TrialBased layer schedules. Additive to schema/core/ast.schema.json — ScheduleExpr.oneOf gains TrialBased.

TrialBased.description: A discrete-trial schedule. Response opportunities are structured as trials (stimulus presentation → response → consequence → ITI), unlike free-operant Core/Core-Stateful schedules.

MTS.description: Matching-to-Sample: a conditional (simultaneous) discrimination procedure. A sample stimulus controls selection from multiple comparison stimuli (Cumming & Berryman, 1965; Sidman, 1971).

comparisons.description: Number of comparison stimuli per trial (Cumming & Berryman, 1965).

consequence.description: Core schedule executed on correct response.

incorrect.description: Core schedule executed on incorrect response. Default: EXT.

ITI.description: Inter-trial interval value in canonical unit.

mts_type.description: Matching type. identity: physical match. arbitrary: class-based match (requires @stimulus_classes).

limitedHold.description: Temporal availability window for comparison responding. MTS(...) LH10s → limitedHold=10.

GoNoGo.description: Go/No-Go Discrimination: a successive discrimination procedure. A single stimulus (SD or S-delta) is presented per trial; the subject responds (go) or withholds (no-go) within a response window (Skinner, 1938; Terrace, 1963; Dinsmoor, 1995a).

responseWindow.description: Duration of response opportunity in canonical unit. Structural parameter: without it, miss and correct rejection cannot be determined.

consequence.description: Core schedule executed on hit (Go stimulus + response).

incorrect.description: Core schedule executed on errors (miss and false alarm fallback). Default: EXT.

falseAlarm.description: Core schedule executed on false alarm (NoGo stimulus + response). Overrides incorrect for NoGo errors. Default: = incorrect. Nevin (1969) SDT-style asymmetric arrangement.

ITI.description: Inter-trial interval value in canonical unit.

limitedHold.description: Temporal availability window. Redundant for GoNoGo (responseWindow already constrains); triggers GONOGO_LH_REDUNDANT warning.
